mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, C.user_dev_name, C.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_dev10 C WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'APC') AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, '' AS user_dev_name, C.sub_name AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.ip AS dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, nt_cfg_subnet C WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.sub_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, C.user_dev_name, C.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_dev10 C WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('SVR', 'VSVR') AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, '' AS user_dev_name, C.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_topo_etc C WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'ETC' AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.item_no = C.item_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, E.user_dev_name, E.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, E.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, s_cm_rack C, s_cm_rack_conf D, cm_dev10 E WHERE A.mng_no = E.mng_no AND A.mng_no = D.mng_no AND C.rack_no = D.rack_no AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, C.grp_name, '' AS user_dev_name, B.sensor_name AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, '' AS dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no, A.item_alias FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_fms_sensor B, cm_topo_group C WHERE A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.dev_kind1 = 'SENSOR' AND A.temp1 = B.fms_seq_no AND A.grp_no = C.grp_no AND A.user_id = C.user_id AND A.user_id = ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND A.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND (UPPER(A.item_alias) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.user_dev_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.dev_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%')
ORDER BY A.grp_name, A.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, A.dev_ip

SELECT AA.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(C.user_dev_name, ''), C.dev_name) AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_dev10 C WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'APC') AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, C.sub_name AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.ip AS dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, nt_cfg_subnet C WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.sub_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(C.user_dev_name, ''), C.dev_name) AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_dev10 C WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('SVR', 'VSVR') AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, C.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, cm_topo_etc C WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'ETC' AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.item_no = C.item_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, B.grp_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(E.user_dev_name, ''), E.dev_name) AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, C.rack_ip AS dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_topo_group B, s_cm_rack C, s_cm_rack_conf D, cm_dev10 E WHERE A.mng_no = E.mng_no AND A.mng_no = D.mng_no AND C.rack_no = D.rack_no AND A.grp_no = B.grp_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id AND A.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, C.grp_name, B.sensor_name AS dev_name, A.dev_kind2, '' AS dev_ip, A.evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_fms_sensor B, cm_topo_group C WHERE A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.dev_kind1 = 'SENSOR' AND A.temp1 = B.fms_seq_no AND A.grp_no = C.grp_no AND A.user_id = C.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, E.grp_name, B.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, B.dev_ip, C.evt_level1 AS evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_dev10 B, cm_topo_link C, cm_dev20 D, cm_topo_group E WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'DEV' AND A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.item_no = C.item_no1 AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no1 AND A.mng_no = D.mng_no AND C.if_idx1 = D.if_idx AND A.grp_no = E.grp_no AND A.user_id = E.user_id AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, A.item_no, E.grp_name, B.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, B.dev_ip, C.evt_level1 AS evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A, cm_dev10 B, cm_topo_link C, cm_dev20 D, cm_topo_group E WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'DEV' AND A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.item_no = C.item_no2 AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no2 AND A.mng_no = D.mng_no AND C.if_idx2 = D.if_idx AND A.grp_no = E.grp_no AND A.user_id = E.user_id AND A.user_id = ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND A.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND UPPER(A.dev_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
ORDER BY A.grp_name, A.dev_name, A.dev_kind2, A.dev_ip ) AA WHERE AA.grp_no IN (SELECT topo_grp_no FROM cm_topo_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = (SELECT topo_auth_grp_no FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}))
